philippines.title: PBA: Kevin Alas disappointed after another twice-to-beat exit
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines–Kevin Alas did not suit up for NLEX on Saturday night, but the sting of another playoff collapse still hit hard. The veteran guard watched from the sidelines as TNT escaped with a 118-112 victory over the Road Warriors at Ynares Sports Center, knocking NLEX out of the PBA Commissioner’s Cup despite holding a twice-to-beat advantage entering the quarterfinals. “It’s the second time in recent memory that we held a twice-to-beat and lost. It’s pretty disappointing,” Alas told the Inquirer after the game. “I guess when we hold a twice-to-beat, we lose,” he added with a slight chuckle. Alas […]...
Keep on reading: PBA: Kevin Alas disappointed after another twice-to-beat exit

philippines.title: 6 modern-day royalty K-dramas to binge-watch after ‘Perfect Crown’
philippines.description:
Seeing the royal family in a modern-day setting is often magical in K-drama land, so it’s no surprise that this particular trope rose in popularity, thanks to the success of “Perfect Crown” led by IU and Byeon Woo-seok. The romcom is currently Disney+’s most-viewed K-drama globally and outside of the Asia-Pacific region. “Perfect Crown” takes place in a fictional setting where South Korea is under a constitutional monarchy. It tells the story of Grand Prince I-an (Byeon) and chaebol heiress Seong Hui-ju (IU) entering into a contract marriage, which draws widespread backlash. Despite I-an and Hui-ju’s insistence on fulfilling their […]...
Keep on reading: 6 modern-day royalty K-dramas to binge-watch after ‘Perfect Crown’

philippines.title: Paul Jake Castillo honors Kaye Abad after actress reveals cancer battle
philippines.description:
Paul Jake Castillo expressed his love and admiration for wife Kaye Abad after the actress revealed her private battle with breast cancer and announced that she is now cancer-free. On Instagram, Castillo shared a photo of Abad and paid tribute to the actress. “To the person who keeps this family tight,” he wrote. We love you sooo much!!!” In a separate post, Castillo also greeted Abad on her 44th birthday. The heartfelt messages came after Abad opened up about her cancer journey in a birthday vlog uploaded on May 17, where she revealed that she had spent more than a […]...
Keep on reading: Paul Jake Castillo honors Kaye Abad after actress reveals cancer battle

energy.title: Nigeria Needs New Export Markets as UAE's Exit Rattles OPEC
energy.description: Nigeria should market its crude oil to new buyers as the UAE’s decision to leave OPEC is dislocating the balance that the cartel and the OPEC+ group have been seeking for years, according to Wole Ogunsanya, chairman of the Petroleum Technology Association of Nigeria (PETAN). The official urged Nigeria’s state oil and gas firm NNPC and other producers of Nigerian crude to tap new markets. “When OPEC gives you a quota, it’s left for you to find who is going to buy it,” Nigerian outlet This Day quoted Ogunsanya as saying.…

energy.title: Indian Airlines Ask Refiners to Postpone Local Jet Fuel Price Hike
energy.description: Major Indian airlines have asked the state oil companies to postpone hikes in jet fuel prices for domestic flights until the Middle East crisis is over, Bloomberg reported on Tuesday, quoting sources with knowledge of the development. India’s oil marketing companies (OMCs) have raised the prices of jet fuel for international flights, which have more than doubled compared to before the Iran war. But they haven’t raised the prices for domestic flights, yet. A decision is expected by June 1, with state oil companies considering a 25% increase.…

usStocks.title: FANUC Accelerates Physical AI Through Collaboration with Google
usStocks.description: FANUC CORPORATION, the world's leading supplier of industrial robots and factory automation, announced a strategic collaboration with Google to advance Physical AI in its robot systems, leveraging Google's state-of-the-art technologies. As part of this initiative, FANUC is advancing its open platforms and Physical AI capabilities to accelerate automation by applying the latest development in artificial intelligence across its robotics product lineup.
